title: Gulf countries scramble to intercept missiles hours into U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement
summary_full: Many Middle Eastern countries continued to report incoming ballistic missiles and drones from Iran on Wednesday, within hours after the U.S. and Iran announced a two-week ceasefire.
summary_public: Many Middle Eastern countries continued to report incoming ballistic missiles and drones from Iran on Wednesday, within hours after the U.S. and Iran announced a two-week ceasefire.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: incoming ballistic missiles and drones from Iran
